Choying Dorje, the Tenth Black Hat Karmapa

7 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Vajrapani Embroidered Mount with Garuda
by Choying Dorje, the Tenth Black Hat Karmapa
China and Tibet, Embroidery: China, Yuan dynasty (1279-1368); painting: Tibet, 17th century · painting 1600s, embroidery c. 1300 · Opaque watercolor, gold, and silver on silk
Vajrapani Embroidered Mount with Garuda
by Choying Dorje, the Tenth Black Hat Karmapa
China and Tibet, Embroidery: China, Yuan dynasty (1279-1368); painting: Tibet, 17th century · painting 1600s, embroidery c. 1300 · Opaque watercolor, gold, and silver on silk
Vajrapani and Garuda
by Choying Dorje, the Tenth Black Hat Karmapa
China and Tibet, Embroidery: China, Yuan dynasty (1279–1368); painting: Tibet · painting c. 1650; top and bottom borders c. 1350 · Painting: gum tempera, gold, and silver on silk; lateral borders: silk damask with needleloop embroidery; top and bottom panels: embroidered silk, lead, and silver paper; curtain: silk tabby; dowels: wood, rawhide, and leather
Vajrapani and Garuda
by Choying Dorje, the Tenth Black Hat Karmapa
China and Tibet, Embroidery: China, Yuan dynasty (1279–1368); painting: Tibet · painting c. 1650; top and bottom borders c. 1350 · Painting: gum tempera, gold, and silver on silk; lateral borders: silk damask with needleloop embroidery; top and bottom panels: embroidered silk, lead, and silver paper; curtain: silk tabby; dowels: wood, rawhide, and leather

by Choying Dorje, the Tenth Black Hat Karmapa
